name: @aristotle/gateway-client
description: Slim, dependency-free TypeScript client for the AristotleOS HTTP execution-control boundary. Re-exports AristotleClient (the canonical OpenAPI-conforming client) from @aristotle/os-sdk and ships the OpenAPI 3.1 spec as both a JSON artifact and a JavaScript string constant so operators can feed it directly into openapi-generator, Stoplight, Insomnia, Postman, or any other OpenAPI-aware tooling without cloning the substrate repo.

scripts.prepare: npm run prebuild && npm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run prebuild && npm run build
